title: Allah Muslim Totem Of Undying Resource Pack
description: Turns totem of undying into allah symbol
body:
**Allah Muslim Totem of Undying Resource Pack**

This resource pack changes the Totem of Undying into an Allah symbol and swaps out the sound effect for a Muslim prayer when it's activated. 

It's a cool way to bring some cultural flavor into the game, making the totem feel more personal and unique. The new fresh look and sound makes it more than just a regular game mechanic. 

With this pack, you’ll get a more meaningful experience whenever you use the totem. It’s a fun way to switch things up and add some cultural representation into your Minecraft world. 

If you're looking for a resource pack that’s different and adds some extra personality to your game, you should try this pack.
